form.formComment: At the latest run raced on the pace before fading 11th of 15 at Chantilly All Weather on March 26 over 1400m, 5.5 len behind Hayejohn with 57.5kg at $5.80. The race before that 2nd of 8 at Chantilly All Weather on February 27 over 1400m, 2 len behind Wit with 58kg at $6.30. Terrific chance to return to form.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming tried to lead throughout but was claimed late 3rd of 16 at Pornichet on February 27 over 2100m, 1.0 len behind Rhipper with 58kg at $4.10. Second run from a spell 2nd of 8 at Lyon-la-Soie on March 21 over 1800m, long-neck behind Another Light with 56.5kg at $9.50. Fitter now and making headway. Winning chance.

form.formComment: Jumped at big odds at debut, 6th of 9 at this track on March 17 over 1400m, slow going 6 len behind Ipso Facto carrying 56.5kg at $31. Should have improved on first run and looks an each way hope.

form.formComment: Last start second last of 15 at Chantilly All Weather on March 26 over 1400m, 8 len behind Hayejohn carrying 58kg at $59. The start before that second last of 15 at Chantilly All Weather on March 12 over 1600m, 13 len behind Montgaudry with 57.5kg at $69. Improvement likely.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Not raced for 50 days. Resuming 9th of 13 at Cagnes-sur-Mer on January 19 over 2150m, slow going 11 len behind User Amistoso carrying 56kg at $7. Last start 3rd of 14 at Chantilly All Weather on February 20 over 1900m, long-neck behind Grand Chelem with 56.5kg at $11. Racing well. Winning chance.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation 13th of 15 at Dieppe July 7 over 1400m, soft track; 18 len behind Charibelle with 55.5kg at $184. On debut second last of 14 at Dieppe May 24 over 1400m, soft track; 9 len behind Zzodiac carrying 53.5kg at $100. Will be better for the run.

form.formComment: Resuming. Only had one start last preparation 12th of 14 at Chantilly All Weather on November 18 over 1600m, 10 len behind Moon Rider with 55.5kg at $73. First up last campaign 4th in a small field at Clairefontaine on August 25 over 1800m, 6 len behind Trophane carrying 57kg at $13. Looking to others for the winner.
